harnesses.name: bank
harnesses.compile: (if not exist tests\bin mkdir tests\bin) && cl /nologo /std:c++17 /O2 /EHsc /D_USE_MATH_DEFINES /I. tests\test_bank.cpp /Fo:tests\bin\ /Fe:tests\bin\test_bank.exe

harnesses.name: filter_port
harnesses.compile: (if not exist tests\bin mkdir tests\bin) && cl /nologo /std:c++17 /O2 /EHsc /D_USE_MATH_DEFINES /I. tests\test_filter_port.cpp /Fo:tests\bin\ /Fe:tests\bin\test_filter_port.exe

harnesses.name: fx_port
harnesses.compile: (if not exist tests\bin mkdir tests\bin) && cl /nologo /std:c++17 /O2 /EHsc /DRHINO_TEST_FEATURES=1 /D_USE_MATH_DEFINES /I. tests\test_fx_port.cpp /Fo:tests\bin\ /Fe:tests\bin\test_fx_port.exe

harnesses.name: voice
harnesses.compile: (if not exist tests\bin mkdir tests\bin) && cl /nologo /std:c++17 /O2 /EHsc /DRHINO_TEST_FEATURES=1 /D_USE_MATH_DEFINES /I. tests\test_voice.cpp /Fo:tests\bin\ /Fe:tests\bin\test_voice.exe
